recommendations.title: Haunter
recommendations.overview: A teenager is stuck in a time loop that is not quite the same each time. She must uncover the truth but her actions have consequences for herself and others.

recommendations.title: My Boyfriend's Meds
recommendations.overview: A Woman's island getaway with her boyfriend is thrown for a loop when he forgets to take his prescription medications along.

recommendations.title: La Colle
recommendations.overview: Poor Benjamin gets stuck in a time-loop while on detention with his high-school crush.

recommendations.title: Re/Member
recommendations.overview: Six high schoolers stuck in a murderous time loop must find the scattered remains of an unknown victim to break the curse and finally see another day.

recommendations.title: The Map of Tiny Perfect Things
recommendations.overview: Two teenagers trapped in an endless time loop set out to find all the tiny things that make that one day perfect.

recommendations.title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: The Flash
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Reverse-Flash manipulates the Speed Force to put the Flash into a time loop that forces him to relive the same day over and over again—with progressively disastrous results, including losing his powers and being fired by the Justice League. The Flash

recommendations.title: River
recommendations.overview: The one-hundred-year-old Fujiya inn stands in the quiet region of Kyoto. Mikoto is standing in front of the Kibune river at the back of the building when she is called back to work. But two minutes later, she finds herself back at the river again. Th

recommendations.title: Boss Level
recommendations.overview: A former special forces agent is trapped in a time loop and relives his death over and over again. To escape the terrible situation, he must track down those responsible and stop them.

recommendations.title: Trapped
recommendations.overview: A man gets stuck in an empty high rise without food, water or electricity.

recommendations.title: Double Take
recommendations.overview: A man on the run takes another man's passport, only to find himself stuck with the identity of a street hustler.
